title: execute_csharp: depth cap stringifies nodes beyond max_depth

steps.title: Prerequisites
steps.body: Bridge running. Optional, automated-covered serialization check: confirm the serializer respects max_depth by stringifying nodes past the cap (bounded payload, no infinite recursion). Depth-cap handling is asserted by the automated test below; this scenario is a runnable confidence pass against the live serializer.

steps.title: Return a deeply nested object with a low max_depth

payload.code: return new { a = new { b = new { c = new { d = 1 } } } };

steps.title: Expected outcomes
items: nodes deeper than max_depth are stringified (bounded payload)
the call returns quickly (no hang, no stack overflow)
the shallow levels still serialize as nested objects

reset.note: execute_csharp is transient (no disk artifact); nothing is reverted on disk.
